title: ipomoea acanthocarpa
intro: Ipomoea acanthocarpa, also known as the thorny morning glory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as acting as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. The leaves and stems of Ipomoea acanthocarpa can be used to make herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits. Additionally, the plant's leaves and stems can also be dried and used as a tea to soothe digestive issues and promote relaxation.
